message:
fix: githubGet body drain, askAI double-click guard, WS timer cleanup, toolsInFlight reconnect (#6854)

- #6823: Drain resp.Body before Close in githubGet retry path so the
  underlying TCP connection is returned to the HTTP/1.1 keep-alive pool.
- #6827: Add synchronous useRef guard (aiRequestInFlightRef) to
  askAIForSuggestions to block double-invocation within a single React
  frame, where the stateRef-based aiStreaming check is still stale.
- #6836: Clear wsSendRetryTimers in both onclose and onerror handlers,
  not only in the main unmount effect. Retry timers firing on a dead
  socket could invoke onFailure on an unmounted component.
- #6837: Seed toolsInFlight optimistically (count=1) for every mission
  being resumed on reconnect, so the inactivity watchdog doesn't fire
  prematurely when a tool_result arrives for a tool whose tool_start
  was lost during the disconnect.

Fixes #6823
Fixes #6827
Fixes #6836
Fixes #6837

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
